examples: Suddenly, high above the jubilant roar and thunder of the revel, broke the clear peal of a bugle-note.
Some people seem to revel in annoying others.
Marie seemed to revel in his old-fashioned chivalry.
However you make it to the summit, revel in the panoramic views across the verdant Surrey countryside.
If part of being green means having outdoor spaces to revel in, then Copenhagen does that consummately.
